blocks.body: Conjunctions are words that join words, phrases, or sentences. The basic conjunctions and, but, or, because, so are the most used in the English language.

{ "title": "10. A brief synopsis", "items": [ "And (and, and) — connects similar elements: tea and coffee.", "But (but) — shows a contrast: cheap but good.", "Or (or) — shows a choice: tea or Coffee? tea or coffee.", "Because gives a reason: because it was raining.", "So shows a result: so I stayed home.", "In negatives, use or: I don't like tea or coffee.", "A comma is placed before but, so when connecting sentences.", "Because + sentence, because of + noun." ] }
